title: Blackberry Ethiopian Stir Fry
description: A sweet and spicy stir fry made with fresh blackberries and Ethiopian spices.
instructions: Heat the stir-fry oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the Ethiopian spices and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Add the blackberries and sour cherries and stir-fry for 2 minutes.
Add the chewy bread crumbs and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Garnish with rose petals and serve hot.
Cook for 8-10 minutes, or until the bread crumbs are crispy and the fruit is tender.
